title: Vietnamese Pho with Seafood
description: A seafood twist on the classic Vietnamese noodle soup. Rich, savory broth filled with tender shrimp and squid, served with rice noodles and your choice of herbs.

ingredients.name: Shrimp
ingredients.notes: Fresh or frozen, peeled and deveined

ingredients.name: Squid
ingredients.notes: Fresh or frozen, cleaned and cut into bite-sized pieces

ingredients.name: Vietnamese herbs
ingredients.notes: Choose from basil, mint, cilantro, or a combination

instructions: Bring the Pho broth to a boil in a large pot over high heat.
Reduce the heat to medium-low and add the shrimp and squid. Cook for 2-3 minutes, or until the seafood is pink and cooked through.
Add the coconut milk and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the soup is heated through.
Cook the rice noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
To assemble the Pho, place a portion of noodles into a bowl and ladle the seafood broth over the top.
Garnish with your choice of herbs and serve immediately.
Serve with additional fish sauce, lime wedges, and chili sauce, if desired.
